'''Enenpa''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located within the [[Thurra system/Legends|Thurra system]],<ref name="GatORW" /> a part of the [[Esstran sector/Legends|Esstran sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by forty [[Moon/Legends|moons]].<ref name="GatORW" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
